description:
Advances: specled.tag_scanning

AST-based scanner extracting @tag spec: requirement ids from ExUnit files. FIRST write AST-pinning tests against Code.string_to_quoted output for all 4 supported tag forms, THEN derive scanner patterns. scan/2 returns {:ok, tag_map, parse_errors} — no silent error drops. Handles @tag spec: "id", @tag [spec: "id", ...], @tag spec: ["a","b"], @moduletag spec: "id". Collects dynamic values (non-literal) as tag_dynamic_value_skipped.

Decision: .spec/decisions/specled.decision.ast_tag_scanning.md

Touches:
- lib/specled_ex/tag_scanner.ex (new)
- test/specled_ex/tag_scanner_test.exs (new)
- test_support/specled_ex_case.ex (add write_test_file/3)

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] All 4 tag forms correctly extracted (AST-pinning tests pass)
- [ ] Parse errors collected, not dropped
- [ ] Dynamic tag values collected separately
- [ ] Property tests pass
- [ ] mix spec.check passes for specled.tag_scanning
title: S2: Tag Scanner (AST-based)
